creator: rfg@monkeys.com
text:
The port of fvwm-1.24r being distributed with FreeBSD 3.3 appears
	to have been built _without_ XPM support included.

	It should have been build _with_ XPM support included.

Fix: 

Rebuild and reinstall fvwm-1.24r yourself, from sources, using the
	normal defaults.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Start an xterm window and then iconify it.  You will see that you
	only get a kind-of cruddy looking "monocrome" icon instead of the
	nice fancy-looking (color) xterm icon that you would get if you
	had compiled and built fvwm-1.24r with all normal defaults (which
	includes XPM support).
